name: Orange Julius
recipeInstructions:
1. Place a blender in an upright position.
2. Fill the blender about three-quarters full with ice.
3. Pour orange juice into the blender until it reaches roughly one-third of the way up the sides of the ice.
4. Add water to the top, ensuring the ice is completely covered.
5. Stir in 1-2 tablespoons of simple syrup (vanilla-flavored syrup can be substituted).
6. Sprinkle 1 teaspoon of instant vanilla pudding mix over the ingredients.
7. Blend until smooth and creamy. You may use egg as an optional ingredient to achieve a thicker consistency.
